title: Injury prevention - Canada.ca
content:
Find safety information to prevent injuries at home and outdoors

### Household chemical safety
Household chemical safety to prevent burns, fires, poisoning and explosions

### Window covering safety
How to reduce risk of strangulation associated with window coverings with long, accessible cords

### Backyard trampoline and inflatable play structure safety
Risks associated with trampolines and inflatable play structures, steps for safer use
Safety risks associated with small, powerful magnets and how they can lead to serious injury when swallowed
Prepare your children to play sports safely
Swimming and pool safety to help protect your children from serious injury or death
Tips for choosing the right helmet and how to wear helmets safely

### Safety around the house
How to identify and fix hazards in your home so it's safe for your children

### Water temperature, burns and scalds
Hazards of hot water and bathtubs for children, how to prevent injury
Health risks of using lead-based paint and lead poisoning, how to check if your home contains lead-based paint

### Lead and cadmium in children's jewellery
Health risks of lead and cadmium in children's jewelry, tips to protect your child from the negative effects of these metals
Tips for safely barbecuing, doing yard work, using lawnmowers, and outdoor torches or any other fuel-burning device

### Furniture, appliance and television tip-overs
What causes appliances and televisions to tip over and how to reduce the risk
How to manage the health and safety hazards of holiday items you bring into your home
Safe assembly, use, placement and maintenance of children's playpens

### Winter sports and recreation safety
How to reduce the risk of injuries and stay safe during winter sports and recreation activities
Statistics that help injury prevention workers, researchers, health care providers, public health practitioners, and the general public reduce the number and severity of injuries across Canada
- Public Health Agency of Canada
